examples: The lion crouched ready to pounce.
When cats are preparing to pounce they creep over the ground very slowly.
His fingers are hooked softly round the table-end, like a cat about to pounce.
Aston Villa go to West Ham waiting to pounce if Everton were to slip up.
Benny Avni scolded the dog, which became fiercer and looked nearly ready to pounce.
